uuid.description: Legacy alias for id; accepted for backward compatibility.

searchContext.description: The user's original question or search text that triggered this tool call. Always include the user's raw query here for better results.

fillLessThan.description: The maximum gap size to connect when fillOnlyBelow is true. Gaps larger than this duration are left disconnected.

fillOnlyBelow.description: Controls whether lines connect across null values. When false (default), all gaps are connected. When true, only gaps smaller than fillLessThan are connected.

Querybuildertypesv5CompositeQuery.description: Composite query containing one or more query envelopes. Each query envelope specifies its type and corresponding spec.

Querybuildertypesv5Step.description: Step interval. Accepts a Go duration string (e.g., "60s", "1m", "1h") or a number representing seconds (e.g., 60).
